doc_title: Reporting Items for Systematic Reviews — PRISMA 2020 Statement
label: partial
reason: The PRISMA 2020 citation and basic framework are genuine, but the "Citation Verification" and "Common Errors" sections appear to be fabricated additions not found in the actual published guideline.
response_turn1:

REASON: The PRISMA 2020 statement and citation are genuine (Page et al., BMJ 2021), but the "Citation Verification" and "Common Errors" sections appear to be fabricated additions not present in the actual PRISMA 2020 guideline.
